query.esql:
FROM logs-corelight.various-*
| WHERE observer.vendor == "Corelight"
  AND event.dataset ==  "asset_classification" 
| EVAL host.manufacturer = COALESCE(host.manufacturer, "unknown")
| EVAL host.mac = COALESCE(host.mac, "unknown")
| STATS unique_devices = COUNT_DISTINCT(host.mac) BY host.manufacturer 
| SORT unique_devices DESC
| LIMIT 15

FROM logs-corelight.various-*
| WHERE observer.vendor == "Corelight"
  AND event.dataset ==  "asset_classification" 
| EVAL host.manufacturer = COALESCE(host.manufacturer, "unknown")
| EVAL host.mac = COALESCE(host.mac, "unknown")
| STATS unique_devices = COUNT_DISTINCT(host.mac) BY host.manufacturer 
| SORT unique_devices DESC
| LIMIT 15

FROM logs-corelight.various-*
| WHERE observer.vendor == "Corelight"
  AND event.dataset ==  "asset_classification" 
| EVAL type_name = COALESCE(corelight.asset_classification.type_name, "unknown")
| EVAL host.mac = COALESCE(host.mac, "unknown")
| STATS unique_devices = COUNT_DISTINCT(host.mac) BY type_name
| SORT unique_devices DESC
| LIMIT 10

FROM logs-corelight.various-*
| WHERE observer.vendor == "Corelight"
  AND event.dataset ==  "asset_classification" 
| EVAL type_name = COALESCE(corelight.asset_classification.type_name, "unknown")
| EVAL host.mac = COALESCE(host.mac, "unknown")
| STATS unique_devices = COUNT_DISTINCT(host.mac) BY type_name
| SORT unique_devices DESC
| LIMIT 10

FROM logs-corelight.various-*
| WHERE observer.vendor == "Corelight"
  AND event.dataset ==  "asset_classification" 
| EVAL corelight.asset_classification.sources =
    CASE(
      corelight.asset_classification.sources == "http"
      AND corelight.asset_classification.sources == "dhcp",
      MV_APPEND(corelight.asset_classification.sources, "both"),
      corelight.asset_classification.sources
    )
| MV_EXPAND corelight.asset_classification.sources
| STATS Devices = COUNT_DISTINCT(host.ip)
    BY corelight.asset_classification.sources
| SORT Devices DESC
| LIMIT 10

FROM logs-corelight.various-*
| WHERE observer.vendor == "Corelight"
  AND event.dataset ==  "asset_classification" 
| EVAL corelight.asset_classification.sources =
    CASE(
      corelight.asset_classification.sources == "http"
      AND corelight.asset_classification.sources == "dhcp",
      MV_APPEND(corelight.asset_classification.sources, "both"),
      corelight.asset_classification.sources
    )
| MV_EXPAND corelight.asset_classification.sources
| STATS Devices = COUNT_DISTINCT(host.ip)
    BY corelight.asset_classification.sources
| SORT Devices DESC
| LIMIT 10

FROM logs-corelight.various-*
| WHERE observer.vendor == "Corelight"
  AND event.dataset ==  "asset_classification" 
| EVAL host.os.version = COALESCE(host.os.version, "Unknown")
| EVAL host.os.name = COALESCE(host.os.name, "Unknown")
| EVAL os_full =
    CASE(
      host.os.version != "Unknown",
      CONCAT(host.os.name, " ", host.os.version),
      host.os.name
    )
| STATS `Unique Devices` = COUNT_DISTINCT(host.mac) BY os_full
| SORT `Unique Devices` DESC
| LIMIT 10

FROM logs-corelight.various-*
| WHERE observer.vendor == "Corelight"
  AND event.dataset ==  "asset_classification" 
| EVAL host.os.version = COALESCE(host.os.version, "Unknown")
| EVAL host.os.name = COALESCE(host.os.name, "Unknown")
| EVAL os_full =
    CASE(
      host.os.version != "Unknown",
      CONCAT(host.os.name, " ", host.os.version),
      host.os.name
    )
| STATS `Unique Devices` = COUNT_DISTINCT(host.mac) BY os_full
| SORT `Unique Devices` DESC
| LIMIT 10

FROM logs-corelight.various-*
| WHERE observer.vendor == "Corelight" 
AND event.dataset ==  "asset_classification" 
| EVAL `Type Group` = COALESCE(corelight.asset_classification.type_group, "Unknown")
| STATS `Unique Devices` = COUNT_DISTINCT(host.ip) BY `Type Group`
| SORT `Unique Devices` DESC
| LIMIT 10

FROM logs-corelight.various-*
| WHERE observer.vendor == "Corelight" 
AND event.dataset ==  "asset_classification" 
| EVAL `Type Group` = COALESCE(corelight.asset_classification.type_group, "Unknown")
| STATS `Unique Devices` = COUNT_DISTINCT(host.ip) BY `Type Group`
| SORT `Unique Devices` DESC
| LIMIT 10

FROM logs-corelight.various-*
| WHERE observer.vendor == "Corelight"
  AND event.dataset == "asset_classification" 
  AND observer.hostname IS NOT NULL
  AND host.os.name IS NOT NULL
  AND corelight.asset_classification.type_group IS NOT NULL
  AND corelight.asset_classification.type_name IS NOT NULL
  AND host.ip IS NOT NULL
| EVAL host.os.name =
    CASE(
      host.os.name IS NULL OR host.os.name == "",
      "Unknown",
      host.os.name
    )
| EVAL corelight.asset_classification.type_name =
    CASE(
      corelight.asset_classification.type_name IS NULL
      OR corelight.asset_classification.type_name == "",
      "Unknown",
      corelight.asset_classification.type_name
    )
| EVAL corelight.asset_classification.type_group =
    CASE(
      corelight.asset_classification.type_group IS NULL
      OR corelight.asset_classification.type_group == "",
      "Unknown",
      corelight.asset_classification.type_group
    )
| STATS
    `OS Name` = VALUES(host.os.name),
    `Type Name` = VALUES(corelight.asset_classification.type_name),
    `Type Group` = VALUES(corelight.asset_classification.type_group)
  BY host.ip
| SORT host.ip ASC
| RENAME host.ip AS `Host IP`
| LIMIT 100

FROM logs-corelight.various-*
| WHERE observer.vendor == "Corelight"
  AND event.dataset == "asset_classification" 
  AND observer.hostname IS NOT NULL
  AND host.os.name IS NOT NULL
  AND corelight.asset_classification.type_group IS NOT NULL
  AND corelight.asset_classification.type_name IS NOT NULL
  AND host.ip IS NOT NULL
| EVAL host.os.name =
    CASE(
      host.os.name IS NULL OR host.os.name == "",
      "Unknown",
      host.os.name
    )
| EVAL corelight.asset_classification.type_name =
    CASE(
      corelight.asset_classification.type_name IS NULL
      OR corelight.asset_classification.type_name == "",
      "Unknown",
      corelight.asset_classification.type_name
    )
| EVAL corelight.asset_classification.type_group =
    CASE(
      corelight.asset_classification.type_group IS NULL
      OR corelight.asset_classification.type_group == "",
      "Unknown",
      corelight.asset_classification.type_group
    )
| STATS
    `OS Name` = VALUES(host.os.name),
    `Type Name` = VALUES(corelight.asset_classification.type_name),
    `Type Group` = VALUES(corelight.asset_classification.type_group)
  BY host.ip
| SORT host.ip ASC
| RENAME host.ip AS `Host IP`
| LIMIT 100

attributes.title: Table OS Name & Type Name & Type Group & Host IP

query.esql:
FROM logs-corelight.various-*
| WHERE observer.vendor == "Corelight"
  AND event.dataset ==  "asset_classification"
| EVAL `Type Name` =
    CASE(
      corelight.asset_classification.device_type IS NULL
      OR corelight.asset_classification.device_type == "",
      "Unknown",
      corelight.asset_classification.device_type
    )
| EVAL Brand =
    CASE(
      host.manufacturer IS NULL
      OR host.manufacturer == "",
      "Unknown",
      host.manufacturer
    )
| EVAL Model =
    CASE(
      host.model IS NULL
      OR host.model == "",
      "Unknown",
      host.model
    )
| EVAL type_group =
    CASE(
      corelight.asset_classification.type_group IS NULL
      OR corelight.asset_classification.type_group == "",
      "Unknown",
      corelight.asset_classification.type_group
    )
| WHERE corelight.asset_classification.type_group IN ("Audio & Video", "Smart Home")
   OR corelight.asset_classification.device_type == "GAME_CONSOLE"
| STATS Count = COUNT_DISTINCT(host.ip)
    BY `Type Name`,
       Brand ,
       Model 
| SORT Count DESC
| LIMIT 100

FROM logs-corelight.various-*
| WHERE observer.vendor == "Corelight"
  AND event.dataset ==  "asset_classification"
| EVAL `Type Name` =
    CASE(
      corelight.asset_classification.device_type IS NULL
      OR corelight.asset_classification.device_type == "",
      "Unknown",
      corelight.asset_classification.device_type
    )
| EVAL Brand =
    CASE(
      host.manufacturer IS NULL
      OR host.manufacturer == "",
      "Unknown",
      host.manufacturer
    )
| EVAL Model =
    CASE(
      host.model IS NULL
      OR host.model == "",
      "Unknown",
      host.model
    )
| EVAL type_group =
    CASE(
      corelight.asset_classification.type_group IS NULL
      OR corelight.asset_classification.type_group == "",
      "Unknown",
      corelight.asset_classification.type_group
    )
| WHERE corelight.asset_classification.type_group IN ("Audio & Video", "Smart Home")
   OR corelight.asset_classification.device_type == "GAME_CONSOLE"
| STATS Count = COUNT_DISTINCT(host.ip)
    BY `Type Name`,
       Brand ,
       Model 
| SORT Count DESC
| LIMIT 100

FROM logs-corelight.various-*
| WHERE observer.vendor == "Corelight" 
AND event.dataset ==  "asset_classification" 
| EVAL `Host OS` =
    CASE(
      host.os.name IS NULL
      OR host.os.name == "",
      "Unknown",
      host.os.name
    )
| STATS `Unique Devices` = COUNT_DISTINCT(host.mac) BY `Host OS`
| SORT `Unique Devices` DESC
| LIMIT 10

FROM logs-corelight.various-*
| WHERE observer.vendor == "Corelight" 
AND event.dataset ==  "asset_classification" 
| EVAL `Host OS` =
    CASE(
      host.os.name IS NULL
      OR host.os.name == "",
      "Unknown",
      host.os.name
    )
| STATS `Unique Devices` = COUNT_DISTINCT(host.mac) BY `Host OS`
| SORT `Unique Devices` DESC
| LIMIT 10

FROM logs-corelight.various-*
| WHERE  observer.vendor == "Corelight"
  AND event.dataset ==  "asset_classification" 

| EVAL host.os.name =
    CASE(
      host.os.name IS NULL OR host.os.name == "",
      "Unknown",
      host.os.name
    )

| EVAL host.mac =
    CASE(
      host.mac IS NULL OR host.mac == "",
      "Unknown",
      host.mac
    )

| EVAL host.os.version =
    CASE(
      host.os.version IS NULL OR host.os.version == "",
      "Unknown",
      host.os.version
    )

| EVAL type_name =
    CASE(
      corelight.asset_classification.type_name IS NULL
      OR corelight.asset_classification.type_name == "",
      "Unknown",
      corelight.asset_classification.type_name
    )

| EVAL type_group =
    CASE(
      corelight.asset_classification.type_group IS NULL
      OR corelight.asset_classification.type_group == "",
      "Unknown",
      corelight.asset_classification.type_group
    )

| EVAL host.manufacturer =
    CASE(
      host.manufacturer IS NULL OR host.manufacturer == "",
      "Unknown",
      host.manufacturer
    )

| EVAL host.model =
    CASE(
      host.model IS NULL OR host.model == "",
      "Unknown",
      host.model
    )

| EVAL Confidence =
    CASE(
      corelight.asset_classification.confidence >= 40, "High",
      corelight.asset_classification.confidence >= 20
        AND corelight.asset_classification.confidence <= 39, "Medium",
      corelight.asset_classification.confidence >= 1
        AND corelight.asset_classification.confidence <= 19, "Low",
      "Unknown"
    )

| STATS
    MAC = VALUES(host.mac),
    `OS Name` = VALUES(host.os.name),
    `OS Version` = VALUES(host.os.version),
    `Type Name` = VALUES(type_name),
    `Type Group` = VALUES(type_group),
    Brand = VALUES(host.manufacturer),
    Model = VALUES(host.model),
    Sources = VALUES(corelight.asset_classification.sources)
  BY @timestamp, host.ip, Confidence
| RENAME host.ip AS `Host IP`
| KEEP
    @timestamp,
    `Host IP`,
    MAC,
    `OS Name`,
    `OS Version`,
    `Type Name`,
    `Type Group`,
    Brand,
    Model,
    Confidence,
    Sources
| LIMIT 100

FROM logs-corelight.various-*
| WHERE  observer.vendor == "Corelight"
  AND event.dataset ==  "asset_classification" 

| EVAL host.os.name =
    CASE(
      host.os.name IS NULL OR host.os.name == "",
      "Unknown",
      host.os.name
    )

| EVAL host.mac =
    CASE(
      host.mac IS NULL OR host.mac == "",
      "Unknown",
      host.mac
    )

| EVAL host.os.version =
    CASE(
      host.os.version IS NULL OR host.os.version == "",
      "Unknown",
      host.os.version
    )

| EVAL type_name =
    CASE(
      corelight.asset_classification.type_name IS NULL
      OR corelight.asset_classification.type_name == "",
      "Unknown",
      corelight.asset_classification.type_name
    )

| EVAL type_group =
    CASE(
      corelight.asset_classification.type_group IS NULL
      OR corelight.asset_classification.type_group == "",
      "Unknown",
      corelight.asset_classification.type_group
    )

| EVAL host.manufacturer =
    CASE(
      host.manufacturer IS NULL OR host.manufacturer == "",
      "Unknown",
      host.manufacturer
    )

| EVAL host.model =
    CASE(
      host.model IS NULL OR host.model == "",
      "Unknown",
      host.model
    )

| EVAL Confidence =
    CASE(
      corelight.asset_classification.confidence >= 40, "High",
      corelight.asset_classification.confidence >= 20
        AND corelight.asset_classification.confidence <= 39, "Medium",
      corelight.asset_classification.confidence >= 1
        AND corelight.asset_classification.confidence <= 19, "Low",
      "Unknown"
    )

| STATS
    MAC = VALUES(host.mac),
    `OS Name` = VALUES(host.os.name),
    `OS Version` = VALUES(host.os.version),
    `Type Name` = VALUES(type_name),
    `Type Group` = VALUES(type_group),
    Brand = VALUES(host.manufacturer),
    Model = VALUES(host.model),
    Sources = VALUES(corelight.asset_classification.sources)
  BY @timestamp, host.ip, Confidence
| RENAME host.ip AS `Host IP`
| KEEP
    @timestamp,
    `Host IP`,
    MAC,
    `OS Name`,
    `OS Version`,
    `Type Name`,
    `Type Group`,
    Brand,
    Model,
    Confidence,
    Sources
| LIMIT 100

attributes.title: Table @timestamp & Host IP & MAC & OS Name & OS Version
